prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `c3202e5a`.
codex_response:
Implemented `c3202e5a` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c3202e5a/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c3202e5a/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c3202e5a/generator.py). The rule is: remove the separator lattice, split the compacted grid into equal tiles, and return the unique tile whose nonzero cells use exactly one color. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, so no `notes.md` was needed.

The generator stays on-family by sampling the observed lattice regimes `3x6` with `3x3` tiles and `4x4` / `5x5` with `5x5` tiles, then filling distractor tiles with sparse multicolor noise and one sparse monochrome target tile. No new shared primitive was added. Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced `1000` examples, generated verification passed `1000/1000`, and I sanity-checked the rebuilt preview output.
